title: Pentapanax leschenaultii

The classification of Pentapanax leschenaultii reflects its unique evolutionary history and its relationships to other flowering plants.
uses: Pentapanax leschenaultii, also known as the Indian barberry or Pentapanax, has been traditionally used in various forms of medicine, particularly in traditional Asian cultures.
